failure_reason: phase_06_gate failed on 1 deterministic predicate and 1 semantic predicate for run ad0d47cc-fea7-4784-a797-79702e9d11b2. (2) instrument_sections_complete [semantic]: instrument_sections_addressed lists only one section (B.3.1, status: addressed). This is a gate failure against CLAUDE.md §7 Phase 6 gate condition ('All instrument-mandated implementation sections are addressed. Risk register is populated.'). The current artifact has resolved ethics_assessment_non_null, ethics_self_assessment_statement_non_empty, and instrument_sections_addressed_non_empty failures from the prior run, but introduces the empty risk_register and the gender plan section absence.
